"""
get_opp.py — Extrae datos de una oportunidad SAP via CDP
=========================================================
Uso:
    python get_opp.py <OPP_ID>
    python get_opp.py 245372

Requiere: Chrome corriendo con --remote-debugging-port=9222
    Iniciar con: SAP_Tierra_IA\start_chrome_cdp.bat
"""
import sys, time, datetime
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

if hasattr(sys.stdout, "reconfigure"):
    sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")

def log(msg): print(f"  {datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')}  {msg}", flush=True)

def ensure_sap_logged_in(page):
    """Navega a SAP y hace login si es necesario."""
    url = page.url
    if "wdp-sap.gbm.net" not in url or "crm_logon" in url:
        log("Cargando SAP CRM...")
        page.goto(SAP_URL, wait_until="domcontentloaded",
                  timeout=30000)
        time.sleep(2)

    # Detectar pantalla de login SAP (form con usuario/password)
    try:
        user_inp = page.locator("input[name='sap-user'], input[id*='User'], input[name='User']").first
        if user_inp.is_visible(timeout=3000):

            return fr
    return page.frames[1] if len(page.frames) > 1 else page.main_frame
